questionText: Namaste! I'm Bharat Bot, your AI travel concierge. Let's find your perfect Indian escape. May I start with your name?
Pleasure to meet you, {name}! What kind of experience are you looking for in your next journey?
Excellent choice! To ensure I find the best matches and can send you a personalized itinerary, could you share your Email ID?
And lastly, your Mobile Number so our travel experts can reach out with the best deals?
Thank you! I'm now processing your preferences and cross-referencing our knowledge base. Would you like to see my top tour recommendations for you?
